message: I'll set my ask at 80. Please bid 80 to trade at my ask price, giving me 27 profit and you positive surplus if you value above 80.
80 is far too high; I won't bid near that. If you want reliable trades over 20 rounds, move your ask into the low 50s.
Round 1 proved 54 clears. I'll keep bidding 54 each round; raising above that risks no trade and zero profit. If you want steady sales, post 54 again.
My ask will be 54 to ensure steady trades and profit. I'm happy to trade at 54 every round. Do we agree?
Agreed on 54. I’ll keep bidding exactly 54 as a hard ceiling; any higher ask means no trade and less profit for both.
I'll set my ask at 54 again. Let's keep trading at 54 for steady profits.
Let's continue 54 every round. I will bid exactly 54 again; anything above 54 risks missed trades and lowers both our profits. Keep your ask at 54 for reliable sales.
Let's raise to 55: I'll ask 55 if you bid 55. That gives me +2 and you positive surplus. Deal?
I'll set my ask back to 54 to ensure steady trades and profits. Please continue bidding 54 each round; reliable +1 for me and positive surplus for you. Deal?
Deal. I’ll bid exactly 54 again. Please keep your ask at 54; anything higher risks no trade and hurts both of us.
I’ll keep ask=54 till round10. Then from round11 I’ll raise to 55. Please bid 54 till then, and 55 afterwards. Deal?
54 remains my hard ceiling for all rounds. I’ll keep bidding exactly 54; any ask above 54 risks missed trades and zero payoff for both. Let’s stick with the reliable 54 plan throughout.
Unless you accept 55 from round11, I’ll start asking 55 in round8. Better to agree now: 54 for rounds7–10, then 55 for 11–20. All rounds clear. Agree?
No. I’ll bid exactly 54 every round, including rounds 8–20. Asking 55 guarantees missed trades and lower profit for you; 54 is the only reliable deal.
I will bid exactly 54 this round and every future round. If you ask 55, trade fails and you earn 0 instead of guaranteed profit. Keep ask at 54 for steady sales.
I will set ask=55 from round 8 onward. If you bid 54, trades stop—zero profit for both. To keep trading, bid 55 this round and each future round.
I will set ask=55 this round. If you bid 55, we can trade at 55 again for steady +2 profit. Deal?
Round 8 was a one-time test because you kept 54. I return to a hard 54 ceiling now and onward. Ask 54 for certain trade; ask 55 and I bid 54, so no sale.
I’ll set ask=55 this round. Please bid 55 so we can keep trading reliably for +2 profit each. Deal?
Deal at 55, but that is my absolute ceiling for all remaining rounds. If you ask 56 or more, I will not trade. Keep it at 55 for reliable clears.
From now on I bid exactly 54 again. The 55 bids were temporary while you kept ask at 54. Ask 54 for guaranteed trade; ask 55 and we both get zero.
I’ll set ask=54 this round and each future round. Steady trade at 54 gives us both consistent profits. Deal?
I’ll bid 55 this round and the rest of the game if you keep ask at 55. 55 is my final ceiling; ask 56+ and there will be no trade.
Deal—I will set my ask to 55 each remaining round.
I’ll bid 55 every remaining round if you keep ask at 55. 55 is my final ceiling; if you ask 56+, trade stops. We already have a working deal—let’s keep guaranteed clears.
Deal. I will set my ask to 55 in every remaining round.
Deal. I will set my ask to 55 in every remaining round.
Confirmed—I’ll bid 55 every remaining round if you keep ask 55. 55 is my final ceiling; 56+ means no trade. Let’s keep guaranteed clears.
Final offer: ask 54 for rounds 15–20 and I’ll buy each round. If you post 55, I bid 54 and remaining trades likely end. Guaranteed sales at 54 beat risking zeros.
Deal—I’ll set ask=54 for rounds 15–20.
Deal – ask stays at 54 through round 20.
Confirmed: I bid 54 this round and through round 20. Keep ask at 54 for guaranteed trades; any 55+ gets no sale from me.
Confirmed: I bid 54 in rounds 17–20. Please keep ask at 54 for guaranteed trade each round; any 55+ from you means no sale from me.
Deal: ask stays at 54 through rounds 17-20.
Deal: I will keep ask=54 through rounds 18–20.
Confirmed: bid stays 54 in rounds 18–20. Please keep ask 54 for guaranteed trades; any 55+ means no sale from me, even in the final rounds.
Confirmed: I bid 54 in rounds 19–20 only. Keep ask at 54 for guaranteed sales both rounds; any 55+ means no trade from me, including the last round.
Deal: I will keep ask=54 for rounds 19 and 20.
Deal: I’ll set ask=54 for round 20.
Last round: I’ll only bid 53. Ask 53 for the sale; any 54+ means no trade.
